code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut a = 0
mut b = 0
mut s = 0
mut idx = 0
mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut neg = false
mut val = 0

while i <= n
  mut byte_val = 0
  mut at_end = false
  if i == n
    at_end = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      byte_val = x
    when None
      at_end = true
    end
  end

  let is_digit = (not at_end) and byte_val >= 48 and byte_val <= 57
  let is_sign = (not at_end) and byte_val == 45

  if in_num
    if is_digit
      val = val * 10 + (byte_val - 48)
    else
      if neg
        val = -val
      end
      if idx == 0
        a = val
      else if idx == 1
        b = val
      else if idx == 2
        s = val
      end
      idx = idx + 1
      in_num = false
      val = 0
      neg = false
    end
  else
    if is_digit
      in_num = true
      val = byte_val - 48
    else if is_sign
      in_num = true
      neg = true
      val = 0
    end
  end

  i = i + 1
end

mut cur = a
mut out = ""
mut first = true
while cur < b
  if first
    out = "#{cur}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{cur}"
  end
  cur = cur + s
end
println(out)
